{{CargoRelic
|name=Mutated Petunia Seed
|class_id=20444
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=This morning glory seed has mutated for an unforeseen reason. Although it is usually shriveled, dousing it with a lot of water will spur rapid growth and huge trumpet-shaped flowers that are able to devour weak creatures will grow. In that sense, it's great for home security.<br>
|fame=31
|art=17
|fth=16
|civ=13
|tech=13
|ss1=Detect enemy positions in Cattle Fight
|ss2=Detect enemy positions in Cattle Fight<br>Enable quick-map in Cattle Fight
|ss3=Detect enemy positions in Cattle Fight<br>Enable quick-map in Cattle Fight<br>Enable Quick Clear in Cattle Fight
|ss4=Detect enemy positions in Cattle Fight<br>Enable quick-map in Cattle Fight<br>Enable Quick Clear in Cattle Fight
|ss7=Detect enemy positions in Cattle Fight<br>Enable quick-map in Cattle Fight<br>Enable Quick Clear in Cattle Fight<br> (Awakened)
}}
